_meta.description: ETS default rules - generic, applies to any user. Add personal rules via ets_add_rule or a local overrides file.

match.subject_regex: (?i)(has shipped|out for delivery|order delivered|your package|delivery update|shipment (update|confirmation|notification)|delivered today|arriving today|arriving tomorrow|expected delivery|package picked up|in transit)
(?i)(order (confirmed|received|placed|#\d+)|thank you for (your order|shopping|your purchase)|your receipt from|purchase confirmation|payment received)

(?i)(\d+% off|flash sale|limited.time offer|exclusive (deal|offer|access)|promo code|use code|shop now|don.t miss|last chance|deal alert|ends (tonight|sunday|today|soon)|save up to|buy now|new arrivals|back in stock|clearance|markdown|doorbusters)

(?i)(people you may know|suggested for you|trending (now|today)|top (posts|stories|updates) (for you|this week)|see what.s new|activity digest|notification digest|your connections|new connections|X people (viewed|liked|shared)|\d+ (new notifications|people viewed your profile))
(?i)(your linkedin (weekly|daily)|people are looking at your|jobs you may be interested|\d+ people viewed your linkedin|linkedin news|catch up on linkedin|new (jobs|posts) for you on linkedin)

rules.reason: LinkedIn digest and recommendation emails (not direct recruiter messages)
Routine subscription auto-renewal confirmations (not upcoming warnings)

match.subject_regex: (?i)(share your (feedback|experience|opinion|thoughts)|how (did we do|was your experience|are we doing)|rate your (experience|visit|purchase|order)|quick survey|take our (survey|poll)|we.d love your feedback|tell us what you think)

(?i)(welcome to |get started with |your account is ready|activate your account|confirm your (email|account)|you.re in|thanks for (signing up|joining|registering)|complete your (profile|setup|registration))

rules.reason: Onboarding and welcome emails from new service signups

match.subject_regex: (?i)(your order|has shipped|delivery|receipt|invoice|prime renewal|recommendations|deals for you|daily deals)

rules.reason: Financial and security alerts - critical, always pass

match.subject_regex: (?i)(offer letter|we.d like to (offer|extend an offer)|interview (invitation|request|scheduled|confirmed|tomorrow|today)|we.d like to (speak|connect|discuss|interview) with you|application (moved forward|advancing|selected|decision|next steps)|congratulations.*(offer|position|role))

rules.reason: Job search milestone emails - offers, interviews, decisions
Legal notices and TOS/privacy policy changes

match.subject_regex: (?i)(new (sign.in|login|device) (detected|to your account)|someone (signed in|logged in|accessed your account)|sign.in from (new|unknown|unrecognized) (device|location|browser))

(?i)(payment (action required|overdue|past due|is due|required)|invoice (due|overdue|past due)|amount (due|overdue|past due)|balance (due|overdue)|bill (due|overdue|past due)|your (bill|payment) is (due|overdue|past due))
